psalm-65-1.verse: There will be silence before You, and praise in Zion, O God, And to You the vow will be performed.
psalm-65-1.prayer: Lord, praise belongs to You. Help my heart remain faithful in worship, gratitude, and devotion to Your name.

psalm-65-2.verse: O You who hear prayer, To You all men come.
psalm-65-2.prayer: Father, thank You for hearing prayer. Draw all people closer to You and teach me to bring every need before You.

psalm-65-3.verse: Iniquities prevail against me; As for our transgressions, You forgive them.
psalm-65-3.prayer: Lord, when sin and weakness feel overwhelming, thank You for providing forgiveness, mercy, and atonement.

psalm-65-4.verse: How blessed is the one whom You choose and bring near to You To dwell in Your courts. We will be satisfied with the goodness of Your house, Your holy temple.
psalm-65-4.prayer: Father, thank You for the blessing of drawing near to You. Satisfy my soul with the goodness of Your presence.

psalm-65-5.verse: By awesome deeds You answer us in righteousness, O God of our salvation, You who are the trust of all the ends of the earth and of the farthest sea;
psalm-65-5.prayer: Lord, answer me with righteousness and saving power. Help me trust You as the hope of all the earth.

psalm-65-6.verse: Who establishes the mountains by His strength, Being girded with might;
psalm-65-6.prayer: Father, You establish the mountains by Your strength. Remind me that Your power is greater than anything I face.

psalm-65-7.verse: Who stills the roaring of the seas, The roaring of their waves, And the tumult of the peoples.
psalm-65-7.prayer: Lord, You quiet the roaring seas and the noise of nations. Calm every storm within me and teach me to rest in Your authority.

psalm-65-8.verse: They who dwell in the ends of the earth stand in awe of Your signs; You make the dawn and the sunset shout for joy.
psalm-65-8.prayer: Father, let my heart stand in awe of Your works. Fill my days with joy as I recognize Your presence from morning to evening.

psalm-65-9.verse: You visit the earth and cause it to overflow; You greatly enrich it; The stream of God is full of water; You prepare their grain, for thus You prepare the earth.
psalm-65-9.prayer: Lord, thank You for caring for the earth and providing abundantly. Teach me to recognize Your hand in every blessing.

psalm-65-10.verse: You water its furrows abundantly, You settle its ridges, You soften it with showers, You bless its growth.
psalm-65-10.prayer: Father, prepare and nourish what You have planted in my life. Let growth come through Your grace and faithful provision.

psalm-65-11.verse: You have crowned the year with Your bounty, And Your paths drip with fatness.
psalm-65-11.prayer: Lord, crown my days with Your goodness. Let every season of my life overflow with gratitude for Your abundance.

psalm-65-12.verse: The pastures of the wilderness drip, And the hills gird themselves with rejoicing.
psalm-65-12.prayer: Father, let even the quiet places of my life be filled with Your blessing, peace, and joy.

psalm-65-13.verse: The meadows are clothed with flocks And the valleys are covered with grain; They shout for joy, yes, they sing.
psalm-65-13.prayer: Lord, let all creation remind me to worship You. May my life also shout for joy and sing praise to Your name.

psalm-65-closing.verse:
Lord, thank You for hearing prayer, forgiving sin, and filling the earth with Your goodness. Help me draw near to You with gratitude and awe. Calm every storm within me, nourish what You have planted in my life, and crown my days with Your faithful provision. May my heart continually worship You and rejoice in Your abundant love.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
psalm-65-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for hearing prayer, forgiving sin, and filling the earth with Your goodness. Help me draw near to You with gratitude and awe. Calm every storm within me, nourish what You have planted in my life, and crown my days with Your faithful provision. May my heart continually worship You and rejoice in Your abundant love.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
